name: Shigru (Moringa)
usesInAyurveda: Tridoshic Modulation: Pacifies Kapha and Vata.
mainMedicinalUses: Highly nutritional 'Superfood' with high Vitamin C and Calcium.
Reduces joint pain and inflammation in arthritis.
Protects the liver and supports kidney health.
plantProfile: Known as the 'Drumstick Tree' or the 'Miracle Tree'.
preparationMethods: Add leaf powder to soups or take as tablets.
safetyProfile: Avoid root bark extracts during pregnancy.
